content.thinking: The output shows many duplicates due to symlinks? Probably many package.json copies. Let's find the one at root. Use find.
We also need to find Makefile.

content.text:
# Makefile for npm tasks
# This file provides make targets that map directly to the npm scripts defined
# in the various workspace packages and at the repository root.

# Default target – run the root build
.PHONY: all
all: build

# Root level npm scripts
.PHONY: build start
build:
	# Run the root level build script which delegates to the toolchain
	npm run build

start:
	# Run the root level start script which delegates to the toolchain
	npm run start

# Workspace specific npm scripts
# Core package
.PHONY: core-build core-test
core-build:
	npm run --workspace=@my/core build

core-test:
	npm run --workspace=@my/core test

# Toolchain package
.PHONY: toolchain-build toolchain-start
toolchain-build:
	npm run --workspace=toolchain build

toolchain-start:
	npm run --workspace=toolchain start

# Codex package – only a test script
.PHONY: codex-test
codex-test:
	@if [ -f codex/package.json ]; then \
		npm run --workspace=codex test; \
	else \
		@echo "Codex workspace not present, skipping codex-test"; \
	fi

content.thinking: We need to remove codex-test which is not in the package.json. But the root package.json has no codex. The codex package exists under packages? There's a codex folder at root. Let's check its package.json.

It has test script. So codex-test target exists. But user says remove codex-test which is not in package.json. Maybe in the root package.json no codex script. But codex-test target is not needed. So we modify Makefile to remove codex-test target. Also maybe modify README? But instruction: remove codex-test which is not in package.json. So edit Makefile to remove codex-test section. Let's edit Makefile to delete lines from ".PHONY: codex-test" to the end of that block. Also update .PHONY list maybe remove codex-test. Let's open Makefile to modify.
